section_name: Priority of Shipment of Stored Goods
text:
(a) A common carrier that receives goods for transportation in its warehouse or depot shall transport the goods in the order received.

(b) A common carrier that violates Subsection (a) is liable for any:

(1) loss occurring while the goods are in the warehouse or depot; and

(2) damage resulting from the delay in transporting the goods.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 2
### Chapter 5. Duties & Liabilities of Common Carriers
##### § 5.007 — Priority of Shipment of Stored Goods

(a) A common carrier that receives goods for transportation in its warehouse or depot shall transport the goods in the order received.

(b) A common carrier that violates Subsection (a) is liable for any:

    (1) loss occurring while the goods are in the warehouse or depot; and

    (2) damage resulting from the delay in transporting the goods.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A common carrier that receives goods for transportation in its warehouse or depot shall transport the goods in the order received.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A common carrier that violates Subsection (a) is liable for any:
loss occurring while the goods are in the warehouse or depot; and
damage resulting from the delay in transporting the goods.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
